message:
feat(connectors,search,ui): unify franken detection across all connectors, improve hybrid search budgeting, and add session-hit navigation to detail modal

Connector detection unification:
- Add franken_detection_for_connector() delegation to aider, amp, chatgpt,
  clawdbot, openclaw, pi_agent, and vibe connectors, making them consistent
  with previously-unified connectors (claude_code, cline, codex, cursor, etc.)
- Refactor connector_to_franken_slug() to return String instead of Option,
  using a pass-through for unknown slugs so new connectors added to
  franken-agent-detection work without a mapping patch
- Add underscore-to-dash fallback lookup in franken_detection_for_connector()

Search query budgeting:
- Remove unused HYBRID_CANDIDATE_MULTIPLIER constant
- Lower minimum multiplier floor from HYBRID_CANDIDATE_MULTIPLIER (3) to 1
  in hybrid_candidate_budget(), reducing over-fetching for precise queries
- Add test asserting natural-language queries bias toward semantic fanout

Detail modal session-hit navigation:
- Add detail_session_hit_lines, detail_session_hit_offsets_cache, and
  detail_session_hit_current fields to CassApp for tracking search hits
  within the active session's message list
- Implement collect_session_hit_lines() and sync_detail_session_hit_state()
  to populate hit metadata when opening a detail modal
- Add CassMsg::DetailSessionHitNavigated variant for n/N key cycling
  through contextual search hits with scroll-to-offset behavior
- Render "search hit N/M" badges on message headers matching session hits
- Rewire n/N keys and Enter in detail modal from DetailFindNavigated to
  DetailSessionHitNavigated for contextual hit-to-hit jumping
- Clean up hit state on DetailClosed and tab changes
- Update help text to reflect new session-hit navigation semantics
- Add regression tests for hit collection, badge rendering, and navigation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
